title: sedum mutabile
intro: Sedum mutabile, also known as the changing sedum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is a deciduous perennial that is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds such as flavonoids and triterpenoids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and can be used to treat conditions such as fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in folk medicine to promote health and well-being, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine.
